guide:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva wants you to get a Junker's Tunic. Get one from Merchant Folsop for free and return to gain level 2.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to Spiritmaster Ula who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar. He signs you in and sends you back to Briva for experience.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Mistress Briva asks you to kill bats and return to her with two pieces of bat meat. Your reward is experience and a **Scroll of Sneak**.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Junker Plim 
Plim will make you a new weapon if you bring him the following items:
- Iron Ore - Purchase from Merchant Folsop
- Copper Spring - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Rat Whisker
- Cracked Ant Pincer

Your reward is experience and a **Footpad's Shank**.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW); you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Talk to Mistress Briva for this quest. She tells you to go out and collect four Size 3 Whirlygigs. They are found on Model III clockworks in the junk heap next to Merchant Folsop's shop. Clockworks will be there, but if you kill them, the Model III clockworks will eventually spawn. All the clockworks in this area are level 7 and do not cause any negative faction. Not all of the Model III clockworks will drop the Size 3 Whirlygigs, so you might have to kill more than 4 to gather the quest materials. Once you turn in the four Whirlygigs, you receive enough experience to level you, a new ability: **Acrobatics** (an Agility buff), and **Grease Stained Trousers**.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to investigate rumors of a foul magic in the works by a DELF named Jarek N'Toxis. Jarek lives in a red tent on the western bank of the River Saren, west of Neriak. He sends you to collect the pieces he needs to finish his experiment. You'll need the leg from a spikeshell crab found on the shore southeast of Neriak. Then grab a wing from the fungus cockroaches on the bank opposite Jarek. The mobs con white. Jarek uses the items to create a giant insect, which kills him and attacks you. Jarek's Creation cons yellow, and its drop is the evidence Briva wants. Reward: **556,000 XP** and a new shank.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to speak with Lady Furess U'Dedne in Neriak. You can find U'Dedne by reading the obelisks that mark the different houses in Neriak. U'Dedne directs you to Freeport to buy an antiqued bracelet from Merchant Gilgash and collect a package from Nalzik P'Thek. Waysender Ti'Thox will waysend you if you want. Gilgash and P'Thek are in the same building, but P'Thek says a courier named V'Ghen already picked up the package. U'Dedne tells you to go speak to Dragoon V'Ghen in a tower directly north of Neriak. The Dragoon points you to his brother in a tent by the tower. You must kill Valrean V'Ghen to obtain U'Dedne's chalice. Valrean cons yellow.

Reward: 100 Faction with House U'Dedne; 10 Faction with the Indigo Brotherhood; 10 Faction with Citizens of Neriak; **550,698 XP**; and **Night Breath Scroll**.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva tells you that House N'Jarus in Neriak is impressed by your work for House U'Dedne. N'Jarus is moving to replace U'Dedne as 2nd house in Neriak. Speak to Zethil N'Jarus, who wants your help in planting an item in House U'Dedne. Purchase the **Lantern of Ages** from Merchant Gilgash in Freeport. Waysender Ti'Thox will waysend you if you like. To go with the lantern, Zethil needs a certain gem from the Final Thoughts that roam near the Crest of the Duelist in Collinridge Cemetery west of Neriak. Finally, Zethil needs the foot of an oriote raven directly south of Neriak. Both mobs are white-con casters. The Final Thoughts roam an area of high-agro undead, and the oriote ravens cluster despite their neutral con when you attack. The finished **Enchanted Lantern** you take to Lady Furess U'Dedne is a spying device.

Reward: **883,791 XP**; **Vaulter's Balance Scroll**; and **Junker's Tunic**.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
1. Talk to Briva, who sends you to Zethil J'Narus in Neriak.
2. Zethil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak at Fort Seriak in Castle Felstar.
3. T'Nak wants a bribe of 1000 Tunar, then sends you to kill Courier B'Malin (CONs LB). To find the courier: Head to the River Saren (the North-South river west of Klick) in the eastern side of Collinridge Cemetery to intercept the courier. Kill, loot a runed cylinder, return to Zethil.
4. Zethil sends you to kill two (2) Groundskeepers.
4.1 Groundskeeper W'Lai (CONs Yel) in Collinridge (C) in the first chamber of the cemetery. Kill, loot finger.
4.2 Groundskeeper F'Redal (CONs Yel) in Castle Felstar (N) roams around. Kill, loot femur.
5. Return to Zethil, return to Briva for your reward.
